ensemble.note: Validated on both halves of the holdout independently (split-holdout consistency check). Best credible strategy composition found across ~15M+ combinations tested over multiple search rounds (2024-2026 H4 EURUSD, ~2.5 years real data). Supersedes the earlier RSI+Stochastic-only ensemble.
ensemble.production_note: Both overlays are now the config.yaml defaults (risk.max_hold_bars, risk.use_volatility_filter, etc.) and are applied automatically by build_config()/LiveTrader. The volatility filter (halve size when ATR is above its own trailing 95th percentile) was the single best individual improvement found across the whole project: it improved return, Sharpe, Sortino, max drawdown, AND profit factor simultaneously, consistently across 85/90/95th-percentile thresholds and both holdout halves. See scripts/test_volatility_and_mtf_filters.py and scripts/test_friend_filters.py for the full comparison.
